transcript.q: Tell me about a recent technical challenge you faced and how you solved it.
What programming languages are you most comfortable working with?

scorecard.summary: The candidate provided essentially no response to a fundamental interview question about technical experience. With a one word dismissal of a core question that any software engineer should be able to answer, the candidate demonstrated a complete unwillingness or inability to engage in the interview process. There is no basis to evaluate any technical competency, problem solving ability, or communication skill from this interaction.
red_flags: Candidate refused or was unable to answer a basic and expected interview question
Zero technical information was shared making it impossible to assess any engineering capability
The response suggests either a lack of preparation a lack of interest in the role or an inability to communicate professionally
No evidence of any problem solving experience or technical depth whatsoever
The candidate showed no effort to engage which raises serious concerns about motivation and cultural fit
